case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ROSA EMMA MEJIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,369.10 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, ROSA EMMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
